member.name: T:dotnet_config_kit.Abstractions.IConfigBinder`1
member.summary: Validates configuration against a type schema and provides strongly-typed access.
member.typeparam: The target type to bind configuration to.
member.remarks: Implementations perform type conversion, validation, and error reporting. Must handle: null/missing values, type mismatches, collection binding, nested objects, and custom converters. All conversion failures must be reported with clear paths to the problematic configuration. Thread-safe for reading and binding, but configuration should not be mutated during binding.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Abstractions.IConfigBinder`1.Bind(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Binds flat configuration to a strongly-typed object.
member.param: The flat key-value configuration dictionary.
member.returns: A new instance of with configuration applied.
member.exception: Thrown when configuration cannot be bound due to type mismatches, validation failures, or missing required values.
member.remarks: Default values (CLR defaults) are used for missing configuration keys. Required fields must be marked explicitly; primitive types are assumed optional. Collections are bound by matching key patterns (e.g., "items:0:name", "items:1:name").

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Abstractions.IConfigBinder`1.BindAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously binds flat configuration to a strongly-typed object.
member.param: The flat key-value configuration dictionary.
Cancellation token for the operation.
member.returns: A task that returns a new instance of when complete.
member.exception: Thrown when configuration cannot be bound due to type mismatches, validation failures, or missing required values.
member.remarks: Async binding allows for custom converters that may perform I/O (e.g., validating with external services). For most cases, use the synchronous Bind method.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Abstractions.IConfigBinder`1.GetValidationErrors(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Gets validation errors for the configuration, if any.
member.remarks: Returns an empty collection if the configuration is valid. Validation is performed automatically during binding; this method allows checking without binding.

member.name: T:dotnet_config_kit.Abstractions.ConfigurationError
member.summary: Represents a single configuration validation error.

member.name: P:dotnet_config_kit.Abstractions.ConfigurationError.Path
member.summary: Gets the dot-notation path to the problematic configuration value.

member.name: P:dotnet_config_kit.Abstractions.ConfigurationError.Message
member.summary: Gets the error message describing the validation failure.

member.name: P:dotnet_config_kit.Abstractions.ConfigurationError.AttemptedValue
member.summary: Gets the actual value that failed validation, if available.
member.remarks: May be null if the error is due to a missing required value.

member.name: T:dotnet_config_kit.Abstractions.IConfigBuilder
member.summary: Loads and aggregates configuration from multiple sources.
member.remarks: This is the primary entry point for configuration loading. Sources are loaded in registration order, with later sources overriding earlier ones (last write wins). Supports synchronous and asynchronous loading. Thread-safe for loading, but configuration should not be mutated during iteration.

member.name: P:dotnet_config_kit.Abstractions.IConfigBuilder.Configuration
member.summary: Gets the aggregated configuration as a flat key-value dictionary.
member.remarks: Keys are lowercase. Values are strings. Empty dictionary if no sources have been loaded. The returned dictionary is a snapshot; subsequent source changes do not affect it.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Abstractions.IConfigBuilder.Load
member.summary: Loads configuration from all registered sources synchronously.
member.exception: Thrown when loading fails for a required source.
member.remarks: Sources are loaded in order. Later sources override earlier ones. Partial failures are logged but do not prevent subsequent sources from loading (unless configured as required).

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Abstractions.IConfigBuilder.LoadAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously loads configuration from all registered sources.
member.param: Cancellation token for the operation.
member.exception: Thrown when loading fails for a required source.
member.remarks: Sources are loaded concurrently where possible, but ordering semantics are preserved (later sources override earlier ones, regardless of actual completion order).

member.name: T:dotnet_config_kit.Abstractions.IConfigParser
member.summary: Parses configuration from a specific format into a flat key-value dictionary.
member.remarks: All implementations must normalize keys to dot-notation format (e.g., "section.subsection.key"). Values are stored as strings. The parser must handle edge cases: null, empty strings, deeply nested structures, and duplicate keys (last occurrence wins). Thread-safe. May be called multiple times.

member.name: P:dotnet_config_kit.Abstractions.IConfigParser.Format
member.summary: Gets the format this parser handles (e.g., "json", "yaml", "toml").
member.remarks: Used for diagnostics and format-specific routing. Case-insensitive comparison is recommended.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Abstractions.IConfigParser.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Parses configuration content into a flat key-value dictionary.
member.param: The raw configuration content to parse. Must not be null or empty.
member.returns: A dictionary of flat key-value pairs where keys are in dot-notation format. Empty dictionary if content is empty or contains no configuration data.
member.exception: Thrown when content is invalid for the format.
Thrown when parsing fails for reasons other than format invalidity.
member.remarks: The returned dictionary owns the keys and values; the parser must not retain references. All keys are converted to lowercase for case-insensitive access.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Abstractions.IConfigParser.ParseAsync(System.IO.Stream,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously parses configuration content from a stream.
member.param: The stream to read configuration from. Must not be null.
Cancellation token for the operation.
member.returns: A task that returns a dictionary of flat key-value pairs when complete. Empty dictionary if stream is empty or contains no configuration data.
member.exception: Thrown when content is invalid for the format.
member.remarks: No seek behavior is guaranteed. The stream position after completion is undefined. For best performance, use buffered streams.

member.name: T:dotnet_config_kit.Abstractions.IConfigSource
member.summary: Provides configuration from a specific source.
member.remarks: Sources can be files, environment variables, memory, command-line arguments, or any external provider. Implementations are responsible for loading data and converting it to a flat key-value dictionary. Thread-safe. May be called multiple times across different instances.

member.name: P:dotnet_config_kit.Abstractions.IConfigSource.Name
member.summary: Gets a human-readable name for this source (e.g., "appsettings.json", "Environment Variables").
member.remarks: Used for diagnostics, logging, and error reporting. Should uniquely identify the source.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Abstractions.IConfigSource.Load
member.summary: Loads configuration from this source.
member.returns: A dictionary of configuration keys and values in flat dot-notation format. Empty dictionary if the source is unavailable or empty.
member.exception: Thrown when the source is misconfigured or unavailable.
member.remarks: Graceful degradation is preferred: if a source is optional and unavailable, return an empty dictionary rather than throwing. Only throw for configuration errors or required sources that cannot be loaded.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Abstractions.IConfigSource.LoadAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously loads configuration from this source.
member.param: Cancellation token for the operation.
member.returns: A task that returns a dictionary of configuration keys and values when complete. Empty dictionary if the source is unavailable or empty.
member.exception: Thrown when the source is misconfigured or unavailable.
member.remarks: Graceful degradation is preferred: if a source is optional and unavailable, return an empty dictionary. Timeout calls that may hang indefinitely (e.g., remote sources). Maximum wait is source-dependent.

member.name: T:dotnet_config_kit.Abstractions.IConfigValueConverter`1
member.summary: Contract for converting configuration string values to strongly-typed values.
member.typeparam: The target type to convert to.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Abstractions.IConfigValueConverter`1.Convert(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a string value to the target type.
member.param: The string value to convert. May be null or empty.
member.exception: Thrown when the value cannot be converted.

member.name: P:dotnet_config_kit.Abstractions.IConfigValueConverter`1.TargetType
member.summary: Gets the type this converter handles.

member.name: T:dotnet_config_kit.Extensions.ConfigurationServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering configuration services with dependency injection.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Extensions.ConfigurationServiceCollectionExtensions.AddConfiguration(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers the configuration library services.
member.param: The service collection to register with. Must not be null.
member.returns: A builder for fluently configuring configuration sources.

member.name: T:dotnet_config_kit.Extensions.ConfigurationSourceBuilder
member.summary: Implementation of fluent builder for registering configuration sources.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Extensions.ConfigurationSourceBuilder.AddJsonFile(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds a JSON file source with optional hot-reload.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Extensions.ConfigurationSourceBuilder.AddYamlFile(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds a YAML file source.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Extensions.ConfigurationSourceBuilder.AddTomlFile(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds a TOML file source.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Extensions.ConfigurationSourceBuilder.AddIniFile(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds an INI file source.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Extensions.ConfigurationSourceBuilder.AddXmlFile(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds an XML file source.

member.name: T:dotnet_config_kit.Extensions.IConfigurationSourceBuilder
member.summary: Builder for fluently registering configuration sources and binding options.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Extensions.IConfigurationSourceBuilder.AddJsonFile(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a JSON file source.
member.param: The path to the JSON file. Must not be null or empty.
member.exception: Thrown when filePath is null or empty.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Extensions.IConfigurationSourceBuilder.AddYamlFile(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds a YAML file source with optional hot-reload.
member.param: The path to the YAML file.
Whether to watch for file changes and reload.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Extensions.IConfigurationSourceBuilder.AddTomlFile(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds a TOML file source with optional hot-reload.
member.param: The path to the TOML file.
Whether to watch for file changes and reload.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Extensions.IConfigurationSourceBuilder.AddIniFile(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds an INI file source with optional hot-reload.
member.param: The path to the INI file.
Whether to watch for file changes and reload.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Extensions.IConfigurationSourceBuilder.AddXmlFile(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds an XML file source with optional hot-reload.
member.param: The path to the XML file.
Whether to watch for file changes and reload.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Extensions.IConfigurationSourceBuilder.AddCommandLineArguments(System.String[])
member.summary: Adds a command-line arguments source.
member.param: Command-line arguments from Main(). Must not be null.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Extensions.IConfigurationSourceBuilder.AddUserSecrets``1
member.summary: Adds a user secrets source.
member.typeparam: The assembly type to scan for UserSecretsIdAttribute.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Extensions.IConfigurationSourceBuilder.AddUserSecrets(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a user secrets source with explicit UserSecretsId.
member.param: The UserSecretsId. Must not be null or empty.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Extensions.IConfigurationSourceBuilder.WithProfile(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the configuration profile for environment-specific settings.
member.param: The profile name (e.g., "development", "production").

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Extensions.IConfigurationSourceBuilder.WithAutoProfile
member.summary: Auto-detects the configuration profile from environment variables. Checks: ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT, ENVIRONMENT, DOTNET_ENVIRONMENT

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Extensions.IConfigurationSourceBuilder.AddHttpSource(System.Uri,dotnet_config_kit.Abstractions.IConfigParser,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Adds an HTTP configuration source with optional polling.
member.param: The HTTP endpoint URL. Must be HTTP or HTTPS.
The parser for the response format (JSON, YAML, etc.).
Optional polling interval in seconds. If set, configuration is reloaded periodically.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Extensions.IConfigurationSourceBuilder.WithMergeStrategy(dotnet_config_kit.Internal.MergeStrategy)
member.summary: Sets the merge strategy for combining multiple sources.
member.param: The merge strategy to use.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Extensions.IConfigurationSourceBuilder.AddLazySource(dotnet_config_kit.Abstractions.IConfigSource,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Wraps a source with lazy loading (deferred until first access).
member.param: The source to wrap.
Optional timeout in seconds.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Extensions.IConfigurationSourceBuilder.ExportAsJson(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Exports the current configuration to JSON format.
member.param: Whether to format with indentation.
member.returns: JSON string representation of the configuration.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Extensions.IConfigurationSourceBuilder.ExportAsYaml
member.summary: Exports the current configuration to YAML format.
member.returns: YAML string representation of the configuration.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Extensions.IConfigurationSourceBuilder.AddMemory(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{System.String,System.String}},System.String)
member.summary: Adds an in-memory configuration source.
member.param: The configuration data. Must not be null.
Optional name for this source.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Extensions.IConfigurationSourceBuilder.AddSource(dotnet_config_kit.Abstractions.IConfigSource)
member.summary: Adds a custom configuration source.
member.param: The source to add. Must not be null.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Extensions.IConfigurationSourceBuilder.Build``1
member.summary: Registers a configuration binder for the specified type and loads all sources.
member.typeparam: The type to bind configuration to.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Extensions.IConfigurationSourceBuilder.BuildAsync``1(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Registers a configuration binder for the specified type and asynchronously loads all sources.
member.typeparam: The type to bind configuration to.
member.param: Cancellation token for the async operation.
member.returns: A task that returns the fully configured service collection.

member.name: T:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.Binding.EnhancedReflectionConfigBinder`1
member.summary: Enhanced reflection-based configuration binder with custom converters and validation attributes.
member.typeparam: The target type to bind configuration to.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.Binding.EnhancedReflectionConfigBinder`1.RegisterConverter``1(dotnet_config_kit.Abstractions.IConfigValueConverter{``0})
member.summary: Registers a custom type converter.
member.param: The converter implementation.

member.name: T:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.Binding.ReflectionConfigBinder`1
member.summary: Binds flat configuration to strongly-typed objects using reflection.
member.typeparam: The target type to bind configuration to.

member.name: T:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.ConfigBuilder
member.summary: Builds and aggregates configuration from multiple sources in registration order.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.ConfigBuilder.AddSource(dotnet_config_kit.Abstractions.IConfigSource)
member.summary: Registers a configuration source.
member.param: The source to register. Must not be null.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.ConfigBuilder.SetMergeStrategy(dotnet_config_kit.Internal.MergeStrategy)
member.summary: Sets the merge strategy for combining sources.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.ConfigBuilder.SetProfile(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the active configuration profile.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.ConfigBuilder.AutoDetectProfile
member.summary: Auto-detects the configuration profile from environment variables.

member.name: P:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.ConfigBuilder.CurrentProfile
member.summary: Gets the current profile.

member.name: T:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.MergeStrategy
member.summary: Strategy for merging configuration from multiple sources.

member.name: F:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.MergeStrategy.LastWins
member.summary: Later sources override earlier ones (default behavior).

member.name: F:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.MergeStrategy.FirstWins
member.summary: First source to define a key wins; later sources are ignored.

member.name: F:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.MergeStrategy.Merge
member.summary: Merge all sources; if a key exists in multiple sources, an exception is thrown.

member.name: F:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.MergeStrategy.Throw
member.summary: Throw an exception if any key appears in multiple sources.

member.name: T:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.ConfigurationMerger
member.summary: Merger for combining configuration from multiple sources.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.ConfigurationMerger.Merge(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String}})
member.summary: Merges multiple configuration dictionaries according to the merge strategy.
member.param: The configuration sources to merge.
member.exception: Thrown when merge conflicts are detected with Throw or Merge strategies.

member.name: T:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.ConfigurationProfile
member.summary: Manages configuration profiles for environment-specific settings.

member.name: P:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.ConfigurationProfile.CurrentProfile
member.summary: Gets the current active profile.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.ConfigurationProfile.SetProfile(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the active profile.
member.param: The profile name (e.g., "development", "production"). Can be null.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.ConfigurationProfile.GetProfileFileName(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the profile-specific filename for a base filename.
member.param: The base filename (e.g., "appsettings.json").
member.returns: If profile is set: "appsettings.{profile}.json" If profile is null: original filename

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.ConfigurationProfile.AutoDetectProfile
member.summary: Auto-detect profile from environment variable. Common variable names: ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT, ENVIRONMENT, DOTNET_ENVIRONMENT

member.name: T:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.ConfigurationSerializer
member.summary: Serializes flat configuration to various formats.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.ConfigurationSerializer.ExportAsJson(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Exports configuration as JSON format.
member.param: The flat configuration dictionary.
Whether to format with indentation for readability.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.ConfigurationSerializer.ExportAsYaml(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Exports configuration as YAML format.
member.param: The flat configuration dictionary.

member.name: T:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.Parsers.IniConfigParser
member.summary: Parses INI configuration format into flat key-value pairs.

member.name: T:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.Parsers.JsonConfigParser
member.summary: Parses JSON configuration format into flat key-value pairs.

member.name: T:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.Parsers.TomlConfigParser
member.summary: Parses TOML configuration format into flat key-value pairs.

member.name: T:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.Parsers.XmlConfigParser
member.summary: Parses XML configuration format into flat key-value pairs.

member.name: T:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.Parsers.YamlConfigParser
member.summary: Parses YAML configuration format into flat key-value pairs.

member.name: T:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.Sources.CommandLineConfigSource
member.summary: Loads configuration from command-line arguments. Supports formats: --key=value, --key value, -k value

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.Sources.CommandLineConfigSource.#ctor(System.String[])
member.summary: Creates a new command-line configuration source.
member.param: Command-line arguments from Main(). Must not be null.

member.name: T:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.Sources.EnvironmentVariableConfigSource
member.summary: Loads configuration from environment variables with an optional prefix.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.Sources.EnvironmentVariableConfigSource.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new environment variable configuration source.
member.param: Optional prefix for filtering environment variables. If provided, only variables starting with this prefix (followed by underscore) are included.

member.name: T:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.Sources.FileConfigSource
member.summary: Loads configuration from a file using a specified parser.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.Sources.FileConfigSource.#ctor(System.String,dotnet_config_kit.Abstractions.IConfigParser)
member.summary: Creates a new file-based configuration source.
member.param: The path to the configuration file. Must not be null or empty.
The parser to use for the file format. Must not be null.

member.name: T:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.Sources.HotReloadFileSource
member.summary: Wraps a file-based config source with hot-reload capability. Watches for file changes and notifies subscribers.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.Sources.HotReloadFileSource.#ctor(dotnet_config_kit.Internal.Sources.FileConfigSource,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a new hot-reload file source.
member.param: The underlying file source. Must not be null.
Whether to enable file watching. If false, behaves as normal source.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.Sources.HotReloadFileSource.OnChange(System.Func{System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.ValueTask})
member.summary: Subscribes to configuration changes.
member.param: Called when configuration changes. Receives new config and cancellation token.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.Sources.HotReloadFileSource.OnChange(System.Action{System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String}})
member.summary: Subscribes to configuration changes (synchronous callback).
member.param: Called when configuration changes. Receives new config.

member.name: T:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.Sources.HttpConfigSource
member.summary: Loads configuration from a remote HTTP endpoint. Supports optional polling for automatic updates.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.Sources.HttpConfigSource.#ctor(System.Uri,dotnet_config_kit.Abstractions.IConfigParser,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Net.Http.HttpClient)
member.summary: Creates a new HTTP configuration source.
member.param: The HTTP endpoint URL. Must not be null and must be HTTP or HTTPS.
The parser for the response format. Must not be null.
Optional polling interval in seconds. If set, configuration is reloaded periodically.
Optional custom HttpClient. If null, a new one is created.
member.exception: Thrown when endpoint or parser is null.
Thrown when endpoint is not HTTP/HTTPS or pollInterval is less than or equal to 0.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.Sources.HttpConfigSource.StartPolling(System.Func{System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.ValueTask})
member.summary: Starts polling for configuration updates if polling is enabled.

member.name: T:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.Sources.MemoryConfigSource
member.summary: Loads configuration from an in-memory dictionary.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.Sources.MemoryConfigSource.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{System.String,System.String}},System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new memory-based configuration source.
member.param: The configuration data. Must not be null. Keys are case-insensitive.
Optional name for this source. Defaults to "Memory".

member.name: T:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.Sources.UserSecretsConfigSource
member.summary: Loads configuration from .NET user secrets. Stores in: ~/.microsoft/usersecrets/{UserSecretsId}/secrets.json

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.Sources.UserSecretsConfigSource.FromAssembly``1
member.summary: Creates a new user secrets source using the app's UserSecretsId.
member.typeparam: The assembly type to scan for UserSecretsIdAttribute.
member.exception: Thrown when UserSecretsIdAttribute is not found.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.Sources.UserSecretsConfigSource.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new user secrets source with an explicit UserSecretsId.
member.param: The UserSecretsId. Must not be null or empty.
member.exception: Thrown when userSecretsId is null or empty.

member.name: T:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.LazyConfigSource
member.summary: Wrapper for lazy-loading configuration sources. Defers loading until first access.

member.name: M:dotnet_config_kit.Internal.LazyConfigSource.#ctor(dotnet_config_kit.Abstractions.IConfigSource,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Creates a new lazy config source.
member.param: The underlying source to lazily load.
Optional timeout for load operations in seconds.
